---
title: My Research
layout: page
---

Here are my research papers and where they're published. Most of my work is on AI for wireless and distributed systems. Take a look and get in touch if you want to talk about any of it.

## Articles

| Title        | Authors             | Venue        | Download PDF |
| ------------ | ------------------- | ------------ | ------------ |
| Neural Point Processes for Pixel-wise Regression | Chengzhi Shi, Gözde Özcan, **Miquel Sirera Perelló**, Stratis Ioannidis | AISTATS 2025 | [Download](./research/NPP.pdf "Download paper") |
| JARVIS: Disjoint Large Language Models on Radio VLANs for Intelligent Services | **Miquel Sirera Perelló**, Joshua Groen, Wan Liu, Stratis Ioannidis, Kaushik Chowdhury | IEEE MILCOM 2024 | [Download](./research/JARVIS.pdf "Download paper") |
| T-PRIME: Transformer-based Protocol Identification for Machine-learning at the Edge | Mauro Belgiovine, Joshua Groen, **Miquel Sirera Perelló**, Chinenye Tassie, Sage Trudeau, Stratis Ioannidis, Kaushik Chowdhury | IEEE INFOCOM 2024 | [Download](./research/T-PRIME.pdf "Download paper") |
| MEGATRON: Machine Learning in 5G with Analysis of Traffic in Open Radio Access Networks |	Mauro Belgiovine, Jerry Gu, Joshua Groen, **Miquel Sirera Perelló**, Utku Demir, Kaushik Chowdhury | ICNC 2024 | [Download](./research/MEGATRON.pdf "Download paper") |
| Deep Learning for Wireless Communications | **Miquel Sirera Perelló**, Kaushik Chowdhury, Albert Cabellos-Aparicio | Bachelor Thesis 2023 | [Download](./research/TFG.pdf "Download paper") |

## Attended Conferences

- **MILCOM 2024** — Washington DC *(presented)*  
  [Download Poster](./research/Poster_JARVIS.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

- **ICLR 2025** — Singapore *(attended)*

- **AISTATS 2025** — Phuket *(presented)*  
  [Download Poster](./research/Poster_NPP.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
